dashboard.title: Notification Center
dashboard.subtitle: The centralized messaging platform — every module publishes events; rules decide who is notified, how and when.

channels.title: Channels
channels.subtitle: Delivery channels — Email, SMS, Telegram, WhatsApp and more. Secrets are encrypted and never shown.
channels.empty: No channels yet — add one below.
channels.name: Name

rules.title: Notification Rules
rules.subtitle: Every notification is a configurable rule. Toggle, edit or delete — nothing is hardcoded.
rules.routeTooltip: Choose which channels deliver this notification
rules.routeHelp: Pick the channels that deliver this notification. Leave it on the default channels to inherit whatever is marked default; select channels explicitly to route this event somewhere of its own.
rules.noChannels: No channels configured yet — add one on the Channels page.
rules.applyToGroup: Also apply to all {{count}} rules in {{group}}
rules.routingSaveFailed: Could not update the delivery channels.

recipients.title: Recipients
recipients.subtitle: People and groups who receive notifications.

history.title: Delivery History
history.subtitle: Sent, failed and queued notification deliveries.

templates.title: Templates
templates.subtitle: Reusable message templates with {{variables}}, conditional blocks, per-channel bodies and preview.
templates.name: Name
templates.subject: Subject / title

groups.title: Recipient Groups
groups.subtitle: Group recipients for bulk targeting in rules.
groups.name: Group name

providerHealth.title: Provider Health
providerHealth.subtitle: Live health of each notification channel (checked every 5 minutes).

preferences.title: Notification Preferences
preferences.subtitle: Per-recipient opt-outs — a disabled preference suppresses that event for the recipient.
preferences.none: No preferences set — this recipient receives everything their rules allow.

settings.title: Notification Settings
settings.subtitle: Branding, locale and delivery defaults for the Notification Center.
settings.logBodiesHint: Off by default for privacy — enable only for debugging.
